name: ai-native-cowork
description: Work-collaboration harness for Claude Code. /cowork-sprint plans work into ~1-human-week sprints WITH you, then autonomously runs each through a full research→plan→design→do→QA→fix→deploy cycle (concurrent sprints, dynamically scaffolded project-local agents, not dev-only; optional dev profile vendors a standalone expert-agent legion + two-axis gap-analysis, all knob-tunable) + /cowork-insights for AI session reports + /cowork-commit for per-commit verbatim directive logs + /cowork-doc-sync (+/cowork-doc-init) for repo docs/ organization (numbered taxonomy, LIVING/FROZEN status, cross-session drift sync via transcript replay) + /pdca-wf runs ONE feature's PDCA cycle with native Workflow as the execution engine (main owns Plan/Design thinking; Research/Do/Check run as deterministic Workflow scripts; verify-to-100). Fully standalone.
